item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Wednesday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
i like halloween.. greetings online friends
not my cup of tea
as is tradition
i lived in AZ for a few years, lucky there isn't usually any humidity
absolutely
oh hell yeah
my mom would say stuff like this too, and we're white
ask for advice
they spelled thief right half the time
they can only move sideways
i guess
poor aussies
Gary Pepper, M.D.
we've all been in this exact situation
mmm hmm
got any more brain busters?
finally
that's my time, have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: This one got me, thank you Steve from Blue's Clues
item.dc:creator: Joyousjoyfuljoyness

item.title: I feel unbelievably numb
item.description: As a transgender woman I have been fearful of this election, but held out hope. As of this morning that hope was extinguished. The stress and anxiety of watching this country be handed over to a fascist dictator who wants to take away my healthcare caused me to fold and pick the bottle back up after 8 years sober. It's 10AM and I've already started drinking again. I called my parents this morning to ask who they voted for. My dad said Trump here was my response: "Then as of now you have lost the right to call me your child, I am cutting you out of my life, do not try to contact me, have the life you deserve." Then hung up and blocked his number. Unfortunately things didn't go as smoothly with my mom, who didn't vote, but was trying to defend my father. She claimed he loves me, and that politics isn't something to cut him off over. I yelled, said "yes it is, and if you're defending him I'll do the same to you." She said "watch how you talk to me, I'm your biggest supporter (dead-name) , I would do anything in my power to support you" Except she didn't. She wouldn't vote against the man who wants to take away my healthcare. So as of today, I am a drunk trans girl without a family...
item.dc:creator: DefinitelyNotASkinWalker

item.title: Meaningless
item.description: I am not a sucker or a loser. My brothers and sisters in arms, fallen or not, are not suckers and losers. With Veterans Day coming up I sincerely hope that I get a lot of that degenerate pile of shits supporters thanking me for my service because they're going to get an earful.

Yeah
m e t a
Everyone in the world when they woke up this morning.
I mean, basically
everyday is suffering
A lot of trump supporters voted to make the lives of some people worse, rather than their lives better.
the creechur
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging http://bsky.abbii.gay: For Bluesky Consider your dansen uncaramelled.
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: Dumping memes to distract myself from watching my rights vanish like a fart in the wind
item.description:
Woke up, Googled results, started sobbing
Put on all black and went to work anyway
Commiserated over coffee with my boss
Made it through the day trying to at least get the next generation to accept people for who they are. Felt like it made a small impact
Small impacts are better than nothing, so I'll take it
My ancestors were Hungarian refugees. I thought we were done with this shit.
One step at a time I guess. We survived it once.
Hot dog
Same.
Me.
My neuro class was talking gender today and I mentioned a parasite that turns crabs female. Suggested "imagine if you got bitten by a bug that turns you male" and one girl immediately made the gesture of doing the helicopter thing. It's a fun class.
True story, I do dream that I slept through class as the professor
Gee I wish I weren't living through a dystopian nightmare
Dog tax because we all need a bit of dopamine rn
item.dc:creator: AnxiousCuttlefish

item.title: Depressing memes for a depressing day
item.description:
I'm scared. Honestly terrified
I keep breaking down on and off this morning. I’m disabled, female, and bisexual. I have a laundry list of mental and physical health struggles that have been making my daily life a living hell- and now I’m worried that new laws are going to make it worse.
I know there's nothing I can do, that I already did everything I could by voting and encouraging everyone I could to vote- but that doesn't help with the outcome.
I feel so helpless and hopeless.
item.dc:creator: AbjectFun

item.title: Brexit
item.description: Good luck everyone. FP Edit: I must thank my cohort @Vanamonde for letting me steal their one liner. Send them some love if you would.

item.title: Bernie’s done screwing around
item.description: I know any message criticizing the Democratic Party is probably pretty unwelcome here in Imgur, but it’s important to be realistic. The Democrats have sat on their hands while the GOP has swiped large segments of their base, and the standard response is to dismiss those voters as stupid. Surely this ejection shows the desperate need for change? Source: https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/bernie-sanders-response-presidential-election/story?id=115582079
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: The outcomes of Project 2025 is on the heads of everyone who didn’t vote.
item.description: I hope they feel the deepest shame and experience the worst of the fallout from this election.
item.dc:creator: ih8clickb8

item.title: Enjoy it while it lasts
item.description: Before I go off, I just want to say to everyone who says we should be the bigger person and not wish ill on people: "no...I don't think I will. I'm tired of being the bigger person. I'm tired of trying to drag people to a better future while they resist. It's clear you enjoyed a life of comfort for too long. Maybe you need to learn why we say that laws are written in blood." To all the women who didn't vote blue, I really hope you learn why abortion rights are important first hand. I really hope you learn what it's like to lose your rights first hand. To all those on govt assistance who didn't vote blue, I hope you learn first hand what you wished on countless Americans and how to pick yourself up by your bootstraps. To all those on govt medical assistant who didn't vote blue, I hope you learn what it's like when you have no health care. To all the LGBT who didn't vote blue, I really hope you learn what it feels like to live in a country that actively hates you. If you're married, I hope you learn what it feels like to be separated from the one you love. I hope you learn what it feels like to be labeled a sexual deviant and a pedophile. To all the Latinos who didn't vote blue, I hope you learn what it's like to be constantly labeled an illegal due to the color of your skin. I hope you learn how awful it will be to have to constantly carry paperwork to prove you are, in fact, legal and still be labeled illegal. To all the "pro Palestine" who didn't vote blue, I hope you learn to ignore the news coming from the Middle East because you will not be happy to see what happens. To all the Jewish people who didn't vote blue, I hope you learn to love your Nazi neighbors, because your party already showed them that they matter. To all the fence sitters, I hope you enjoy not having to sit on the fence anymore. You won't ever have to make the tough choice between a "moderate" female and the Nazi dictator ever again, because you'll be eating Nazi dictators for the rest of your life. To all those saying that we just need to try and vote better next time and plan better, I hope you realize soon that there won't be another fair vote. We will turn into countries like Russia and Afghanistan where the elections are rigged and the leaders are theocratic dictators. This will not go away with a simple vote and I have no confidence that the people will decide to get violent unless everything is burning.
item.dc:creator: MCNewYorkLives

item.title: What we're going to do now
item.description: "We're going to do what Kamala Harris wanted us to do. We are going to form families. Not just blood, but with each other. We're going to stand up for each other, we're going to stand with each other, and we're going to care about each other not for our government, but despite our government". **FP Edit** Thank you everybody for getting this to the front page so that we can all be on the same page. This fight is far from being over. I have been through Reagan, George Bush Sr and Junior, and the first Trump administration. We've got this but we've got to stick together. Be kind to each other, and be kind of all animals please. We and they all count on us.
item.dc:creator: PlantBasedCJ

item.title: The CIA'S simple sabotage manual
item.description:
Apropo of nothing, I just wanted to share. https://www.cia.gov/static/5c875f3ec660e092cf893f60b4a288df/SimpleSabotage.pdf
Finite and Infinite Games
Debt, By David Graeber
Other fun reading is "Recapture the Rapture", a book about how the rich acknowledge the world is ending and have focused their efforts on taking as much as they can and figuring out how to control their private armies when money is meaningless. Also about SEX, DRUGS, and ROCK AND ROLL.
item.dc:creator: BenArowndaBlok

item.title: Returning stolen goods pt 102
item.description:
Columbia shuttle and 3 ½ hrs but ya.
The funniest of them all is everything in The One Where No One Is Ready
And then there's me. I will make your stupid idiot charger my #1 priority and end up forgetting my own stuff cause I dont want to let you down.
I'm forcing hubby to watch A League Of Their Own with me again. Send him memes of cats, he's allergic. @Prendsen
item.dc:creator: MrsPrendsen

item.title: I feel empty inside.
item.description: I had decided I wanted to transition about a year ago. It took a long time to realize and accept that it was what I wanted, what I needed. I just got a job that offered benefits, benefits that I could use to start transitioning. I had a new name, it sounded right, it felt right, it was me. I was practicing my voice, I still needed a lot of work, but I was happy with the progress. I knew I needed to do this. I hated what I saw in the mirror everyday. I didn't care about my body because I didn't want it. So much about me felt wrong and it fuelled my depression, I was so close to ending it all. I had hope for the first time in a long time, now it's gone. Now all I can do is decide how it all ends, if I even get to do that. Edit: Most viral, wow. I am touched, truly, by all the kindness and love being shown to me. You all gave me the courage to come out to my parents. They're good people, and I love them so much, but I was terrified of telling them and risking losing them. I shouldn't have been afraid, they're very supportive. The tears are gone now, and I have decided what I want to do. I'm scared, sad, and very angry. I could push all of this into the darkest corner of my mind, and hide. I refuse to do that. I would rather push back and fight. I won't go quietly, I want to live as my true self for one day, then live a long life as a lie. For those who wanted to know, the name I chose is Laena (lay-na). Also, as a most viral request, let those you care know just how much they mean to you.
item.dc:creator: Draxx127

item.title: How did this happen?
item.description: Speechless European. Trained in Philosophy, Art, Cloud Computing and Marketing. From today on I seriously believe raising my three children centered on books and benevolence was a grief mistake. I hide in my fully equipped streaming room since years terrified to push the live button because I am fairly certain none wants to hear what life has taught me. All I love in society seems to be dying, Imgur is the last resort of wit and the most beautiful expression of humanity and it‘s diversity for me. I love to visit here each day when I feel alone, lost in my useless knowledge and many interests. Today we’ve possibly sealed humanity’s grave for good. My point is though, that we’ve carefully carried it to the grave each day by hiding at home, passively, not openly organizing and revolting against the obvious forces. History won’t repeat itself. There is no country to flee to for the Avantgarde.
item.dc:creator: mtek
